title: The Umbralkers (horror)
description:
The Umbralkers are a mutation of another fungal species called the "extenta glomerorum artus"...

(non-dweller horror mod)
body:
![The Umbralkers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f00085400b7ff4d1eeff6dc242852cb175798ab5.png)


This horror mod was inspired by some old sketches ive drawn before

# **Note: geckolib is required for this mod!**
# 
**This mod is still fairly early in development, expect bugs but more features and fixes in the future!**

**_features:_**


-**Dawn,** a failed attempt at mimicing humans, it can be seen lurking in the desert watching you.
They fade away when you're too close to them leaving only their fedora behind.


-**Tall,** a hostile towering creature that emerges in coniferous forests. They can drop:

-the umbresidue 
(crafting material, highly unstable, best if you were not to drop it)
 
-the looming crown (wearable, disables talls from spawning, gives night vision but also gives mining fatigue in exchange) 

-fractured limbranch (combined with Umbresidue and umbryphae to craft regular limbranch)


**Falling Umbryphae,** An invasive species that commonly grows in the caves and drop down onto an unsuspecting victim. 

They drop edible hyphae when killed (crafting material) 


**Blossom,** a mysterious blossom that sprouts in lush and damp areas. 
They can drop:

-umbranther (edible but not reccomended, crafting material) 

-blossom chunk (brews into potion of blossom's haze)

**Umbriaca,** a bird-like creature that you should stay well away from.
It can drop it's feather, which in return can be brewed into a potion that can be extremely useful for bait.

**Umbrration,** it likes to keep you company. 

...and make you insane.

**Panic Shrine,** an extrememly unpredictable entity that wont leave you alone unless you destroy it.
when broken with any pickaxe, it drops a fragment, if you hit a mob with it, it will convert into a new shrine. However, you can craft 3 of them into a placeable baby shrine.

**The Staff of Umbralkers,** a fairly powerful ranged weapon that can cause destruction if used the wrong way.

-uses Umbrojectiles as ammo

**Thorned Umbryphae Block,** if you combine a few umbryphae with the Umbresidue you can craft a pretty useful trap material!



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

 ***it.***  ~~[][][][] []##[][] [][][]#[][] ##[][][][][]~~


</details>


a silly potion perfect for messing around with friends :3
